settings.heading: Returns & Refunds
settings.subtitle: Shop with confidence. Local returns and refunds handled by our Doha team.

settings.heading: Returns policy
settings.content:
You can return most items within 7 days of delivery in their original, unused packaging. Refunds are issued to your original payment method once the item is received and inspected.

Some items are non-returnable for hygiene or safety reasons. For the full terms, see our refund policy.

settings.title: Contact us
settings.text: Message our team with your order number and the item you want to return.

settings.title: Pack it up
settings.text: Repack the item in its original, unused packaging with all accessories.

settings.title: Get your refund
settings.text: Once we receive and inspect the item, we refund your original payment method.
